narrative:
Cols 32-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,203 registered voters, with 47.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 39.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 25.8 percentage points.
